corrections.text: The article states 'The system has a discharge duration of 5.7 hours, [ESS News] reported.' That 5.7-hour figure does not appear in the ESS News report or in either other cited source. It is consistent with the system's rated capacity (660 MWh divided by 116 MW is approximately 5.7 hours) but was not reported by ESS News and should not have been attributed to it.

The article attributes the claim that this is 'the first large-scale standalone energy storage system Engie has built in the country' to ESS News. ESS News does not make that claim. The fact is correct and is supported by Engie's own release ('el primer sistema de almacenamiento standalone a gran escala de la compania en el pais') and by pv magazine Latin America ('el primer proyecto a gran escala de almacenamiento puro (stand-alone)'); the citation should point to those sources rather than to ESS News.
